## BroadcastChannelEndpoints class

Enhanced BroadcastChannel-based endpoint pair for testing with multi-instance support This now properly simulates how BroadcastChannels work in real browsers with multiple instances per channel name and proper message broadcasting.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class BroadcastChannelEndpoints implements EndpointPair 
```
**Implements:** [EndpointPair](./testing.endpointpair.md)
